articles.title: Energy Fallout From Iran War Signals Global Wake-Up Call for Renewable Energy
articles.excerpt: The war in Iran is exposing the world’s reliance on fragile fossil fuel routes, lending urgency to calls for hastening the shift to renewable energy. Fighting has all but halted oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz, the narrow waterway …

articles.title: Google Gemini now lets users import memories and chats from rival chatbots

articles.title: Transporters call for faster payout of diesel subsidies citing liquidity crisis
